procs.details: Summon a storm of bone and cartilage surrounding you dealing arcane damage.
Summon spikes from the ground impaling monsters in a target area dealing arcane damage and knocking them up.
Attacks have a chance to throw knives around you dealing damage physical damage to nearby monsters. Additionally the knives have a chance to ricochet to nearby monsters.
Release a bellowing shout dealing cold damage to all monsters around you and freezing them.
Summon a holy hammer that spirals outwards dealing arcane damage on hit.
Unleash solar flare projectiles that homes towards monsters.
Send plague rats in target direction dealing poison damage on impact.
Unleash multiple sparking bolts of electricity dealing lightning damage on hit.
Fire a colossal arrow exploding on hit dealing area of effect damage.
